title: Welltower (WELL)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Welltower using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Welltower is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-pc4sods5>
Welltower is experiencing massive tailwinds in its Senior Housing Operating (SHO) segment due to the aging population and lack of new supply. High occupancy gains and rent increases justify a strong 15% growth rate as FCF accelerates.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF instead of FFO or AFFO multiples?
